content:
# Well Placement Optimization

**Summary**: The process of determining the optimal locations and trajectories for wells to maximize recovery or economic return.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2014-ali|Ali, 2014]] performed well placement optimization using both single-objective and lexicographic multi-objective approaches.

- [[2015-khan|KHAN, 2015]] focused on well placement optimization including location, length, and control parameters.

## Scientific Context

- [[2014-ali|Ali, 2014]] Critical for maximizing the economic value of a reservoir over varying investment horizons.

- [[2015-khan|KHAN, 2015]] focused on well placement optimization including location, length, and control parameters.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2014-ali|Ali, 2014]] evaluated through simulation comparison of different optimization algorithms.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Lexicographic approach yielded better results across short, medium, and long term scenarios compared to single objective methods. ([[2014-ali|Ali, 2014, p. 120]])


- Optimization successfully determined optimal parameters while satisfying minimum spacing constraints. ([[2015-khan|KHAN, 2015, p. 15]])
